actions.body:
Hi {{lead.name}},

Exciting news — your pool consultation with {{lead.salesperson_fullName}} is confirmed!

Here's what to expect:

• We'll walk your yard together and discuss your vision
• You'll get expert advice on pool placement, design options, and features
• We'll talk through budget ranges so there are no surprises

A few things that help us give you the best experience:
✅ Think about what you want — lap pool, freeform, spa, tanning ledge?
✅ Know your approximate budget range
✅ Have any inspiration photos ready (Pinterest, magazines, etc.)
✅ Make sure we can access your full backyard

We've built hundreds of pools across South Central Texas and we're excited to help you create something amazing.

See you soon!

name: Post-Build — Day 30 Maintenance Tips Email

actions.subject: Pool Owner Pro Tips — Keep Your Pool Perfect 💧
actions.body:
Hi {{lead.name}},

Congrats on your first month as a pool owner! Here are some quick tips to keep everything running beautifully:

💧 Check chlorine and pH weekly (or let us do it!)
🍂 Skim and clean the filter basket regularly
🔧 Run your pump 8-12 hours daily in summer
🌡️ Watch for algae in the Texas heat — brush walls weekly
⚡ Schedule annual equipment checkups

Don't want to deal with any of that? Our weekly maintenance service starts at just $240/month. We handle chemicals, cleaning, equipment checks — everything.

👉 Want to add weekly service? Just reply to this email or call us.

Your pool is an investment — let's keep it looking amazing.

Worthey Aquatics
(210) 760-7236

name: Existing Customer — Annual Pool Checkup Email

actions.subject: Time for Your Annual Pool Health Checkup! 🔧
actions.body:
Hi {{lead.name}},

Can you believe it's been almost a year? Time flies when you're enjoying your pool!

Just like your car needs regular service, your pool equipment benefits from an annual checkup. Our technicians will inspect:

🔧 Pump and motor performance
💧 Filter condition and pressure
⚡ Electrical connections and timers
🌡️ Heater efficiency (if applicable)
🏊 Surface and tile condition

An annual checkup catches small issues before they become expensive repairs. Most visits take about an hour.

📞 Schedule your checkup: (210) 760-7236
Or just reply to this email.

Thanks for being part of the Worthey family!

Worthey Aquatics

_disabled_reason: Tyler ordered: no unapproved emails. Needs branded template redesign.

name: Existing Customer — Equipment Upgrade Reminder Email

actions.subject: Is Your Pool Equipment Due for an Upgrade?
actions.body:
Hi {{lead.name}},

Pool equipment typically lasts 7-10 years, and yours may be getting close. Aging equipment doesn't just risk breakdowns — it costs you more in energy every month.

Modern upgrades that pay for themselves:

⚡ Variable-speed pumps — save $50-100/month on electricity
🌡️ Heat pumps — 3x more efficient than gas heaters
💡 LED lighting — 80% less energy, lasts 10x longer
🤖 Smart automation — control everything from your phone

We offer free equipment assessments — we'll tell you honestly what needs replacing now vs. what can wait.

📞 Schedule your free assessment: (210) 760-7236

Don't wait for a breakdown in July!

Worthey Aquatics
